name: Chicken and Potatoes Oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and cut into 1-inch cubes. Set aside.
2. Melt butter in a heavy skillet, such as cast iron. Add onions and sauté until golden brown. Add chicken breasts and potatoes. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover and cook on medium heat for 20 minutes, stirring often.
3. Sprinkle with oregano and Italian seasonings. Continue to cook, stirring often, for another 20 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with parsley and continue to cook until the chicken is done to your satisfaction.
